sql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{status} AND department_id IN (#{deptIds}) FOR UPDATE
templateSql:
SELECT * FROM users
<where>
    <if test="id != null">
        AND id = #{id}
    </if>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
<if test="forUpdate == true">
    FOR UPDATE
    <if test="skipLocked == true">
        SKIP LOCKED
    </if>
</if>
